markdown:
# Pin Pin Chinese has shut down

I appreciate everyone's support along the way ♥


Please don't let this hinder your language journey and keep learning :)


If you're looking for a Chinese-English dictionary, I recommend trying out [Pleco](https://www.pleco.com/).


P.S. In order to comply with CCPA and other recently established regulations, _all user data has been permanently deleted_.

metadata.title: Pin Pin Chinese has shut down
